G : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup G
inst✝¹ : Fintype G
inst✝ : Module (ZMod 2) G
x : G
hx : x ≠ 0
⊢ Nat.card ↑{φ | φ x = 1} = Nat.card G / 2

proof:
let e : {φ : G →+ ZMod 2 | φ x = 1} ≃ {φ : G →+ ZMod 2 | φ x = 0} :=
    ⟨fun φ ↦ ⟨φ.1 - AddMonoidHom.mk (fun _ ↦ φ.1 x), by simp [φ.2]⟩,
     fun φ ↦ ⟨φ.1 + AddMonoidHom.mk (fun _ ↦ 1), by simp⟩,
     fun φ ↦ by ext; simp,
     fun φ ↦ by ext; simp⟩
  rw [Nat.card_congr e, ← Nat.card_eq_fintype_card, ← Nat.card_eq_fintype_card,
      Fintype.card_eq.mpr ⟨(QuotientAddGroup.mk' (AddMonoidHom.ker (AddMonoidHom.mk (fun _ ↦ 1) : G →+ ZMod 2))).toEquiv⟩,
      AddSubgroup.index_eq_card, AddMonoidHom.card_ker (AddMonoidHom.mk (fun _ ↦ 1) : G →+ ZMod 2)]
  simp [hx]
